mapper.insert: insert into user (account, password, name, role) values (#{account}, #{password}, #{name}, #{role});
insert into notice (title, name, content, release_time) values (#{title}, #{name}, #{content}, #{release_time});
insert into feedback (time, account, content, site) values (#{time}, #{account}, #{content}, #{site});
mapper.update: update user set account = #{account}, password =#{password}, gender = #{gender}, mail = #{mail}, role = #{role} where id = #{id};
